description: Bundled Mock AI knowledge base. The MockAIAdapter grounds answers on the assistant's own documents first, then falls back to these general domain entries.

entries.title: Paid Time Off
entries.content: Full-time employees accrue 20 paid vacation days per year plus 10 public holidays. Unused vacation carries over up to 5 days into the next year. Requests should be submitted at least two weeks in advance.

entries.title: Remote Work
entries.content: Employees may work remotely up to 3 days per week with manager approval. A home-office stipend of $200 is provided annually to support remote setups.

entries.title: Benefits
entries.content: The company offers health, dental, and vision insurance. A 401(k) retirement plan matches employee contributions up to 5% of salary. Open enrollment happens each November.

entries.title: Expense Reimbursement
entries.content: Business expenses are reimbursed within 14 days of an approved report. Receipts are required for any expense over $25. Travel meals are capped at $75 per day.

entries.title: Invoice Payment Terms
entries.content: Standard vendor payment terms are Net 30. Early payment discounts of 2% apply if invoices are paid within 10 days. Purchase orders are required for amounts above $1,000.

entries.title: Password Policy
entries.content: Passwords must be at least 12 characters and are rotated every 90 days. Multi-factor authentication is required for all corporate accounts. Report lost devices to IT immediately.

entries.title: VPN Access
entries.content: Remote access to internal systems requires the corporate VPN. Install the VPN client from the IT portal and authenticate with your SSO credentials and MFA.

entries.title: Travel Booking
entries.content: All business travel must be booked through the approved travel portal. Economy class is standard for flights under 6 hours. Hotel rates should not exceed $250 per night without approval.

entries.title: Support SLA
entries.content: Priority 1 incidents are responded to within 1 hour, Priority 2 within 4 hours, and Priority 3 within one business day. Support is available 24/7 for critical outages.

entries.title: Discount Approval
entries.content: Sales representatives may offer discounts up to 10% without approval. Discounts between 10% and 25% require manager sign-off. Anything above 25% requires VP approval.

entries.title: NDA Policy
entries.content: A mutual non-disclosure agreement must be signed before sharing confidential information with external parties. NDAs are valid for 3 years unless otherwise specified.
